title: Shop
intro: Each piece you see is a sample. Everything can be made to fit your style, your size, and your preferences.
emptyMessage: No items are listed right now. Check back soon.

thingsToKnow.title: Things to Know
items: Bracelets are made with stretch cord or wire, your choice.
Necklaces are made to the length of your choosing.

shipping: Taxes and shipping are applied to each order. Spend $60 or more and shipping is free, though taxes still apply.
